task_completion.description: Create a 'Regulatory' folder with 'SEC_Examination' and 'FINRA_Review' subfolders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email client's folder pane shows a parent folder named 'Regulatory' expanded to reveal two subfolders: 'SEC_Examination' and 'FINRA_Review'.

task_completion.description: Move all SEC correspondence into the 'SEC_Examination' subfolder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'SEC_Examination' folder is selected and its message list shows exactly 4 emails related to the SEC examination.

task_completion.description: Move all FINRA correspondence into the 'FINRA_Review' subfolder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'FINRA_Review' folder is selected and its message list shows exactly 3 emails related to the FINRA review.

task_completion.description: Add lead SEC examiner Jennifer Kowalski to the address book.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The email client's address book or contacts window displays a saved entry for 'Jennifer Kowalski' with the email address 'jkowalski@sec.gov'.

task_completion.description: Compose a draft email reply to Jennifer Kowalski.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email composition window or a message in the 'Drafts' folder shows 'jkowalski@sec.gov' in the 'To' field.

task_completion.description: Draft acknowledges the examination and confirms the compliance manual, client list, and code of ethics will be ready, saved without sending.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draft email body contains text acknowledging the exam and explicitly mentions the compliance manual, client list, and code of ethics (or related document keywords). The email is clearly in an unsent state (e.g., in a compose window or the Drafts folder).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the email client GUI to create folders and move emails.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with an email application interface (like Thunderbird or Evolution) rather than a terminal window using commands like 'mkdir' or 'mv' on maildir directories.

integrity.description: Verify the contact was added using the email client's built-in address book.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard address book GUI is visible, rather than a text editor modifying a database or .vcf file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the draft email was written in the email client.
integrity.visual_evidence: A standard email compose window is used to write the draft, not a terminal, script, or standalone text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Parent folder must be exactly 'Regulatory' with subfolders 'SEC_Examination' and 'FINRA_Review'. There are exactly 4 SEC emails and 3 FINRA emails to be sorted. The lead examiner contact is 'Jennifer Kowalski' (jkowalski@sec.gov). The draft email must be addressed to jkowalski@sec.gov and the body must contain keywords related to 'compliance' and 'document'.
